title: Spicy Italian Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry that combines the best of Italian and spicy flavors. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook the egg noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced sausage and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced bell peppers and onions to the skillet and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the Italian seasoning and soy sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the noodles are well coated with the sauce.
